description_long: This monument features a tall, slender obelisk made of gray stone, rising from a rugged, stone-textured base. The front face of the obelisk bears an inscription in French, with the text engraved in a formal, serif style. To the right of the obelisk, a detailed statue of a soldier in uniform stands atop a rocky pedestal, holding a rifle and gazing forward. The base extends outward on both sides, with the left side displaying a plaque or tablet embedded in the stone. The overall structure is weathered, with visible textural variations and a matte finish, suggesting it is a commemorative war memorial. The monument is designed to be a prominent, static feature in a public urban space such as a park or plaza.
description: A tall gray stone obelisk with engraved inscriptions, flanked by a soldier statue and a stone base with a plaque. The monument has a rugged, weathered appearance and serves as a commemorative memorial.
description_view_0: Front view showing the engraved inscription, the soldier statue on the right, and a plaque on the left side of the stone base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the soldier statue and the thickness of the obelisk, with the rocky base extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the obelisk, the rear of the soldier statue, and the stone base without visible inscriptions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the unadorned side of the obelisk and the rugged stone base, with no visible plaques or statues.
attribute_inscription: Engraved inscription in French on the front face of the obelisk, in a formal serif style. The text is partially legible and appears to commemorate fallen soldiers.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative soldier statue in uniform with a rifle on the right side of the base; no other visible ornamentation or motifs on the obelisk itself.
attribute_base_design: The base is constructed from rough, irregular stone, extending outward on both sides. The left side features a rectangular plaque or tablet, while the right side supports the soldier statue. The base is rugged and uneven, mimicking natural rock.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the obelisk is pointed and unadorned, with a simple, smooth finish matching the rest of the shaft.
attribute_surrounding_features: Features include a soldier statue on the right and a plaque on the left, both integrated into the stone base. No vegetation, fencing, or additional objects are immediately present.
